citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: ... Provide a landlord reference within 5 working days when you email us at accommodation@napier.ac.uk
Please contact privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk with your enquiries.
We have a dedicated member of staff that can give you information and tips on how to find accommodation.
ENSA Advice ... Please contact ENSA Advice on 0131 229 8791 to arrange an appointment or email ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk
If you wish to be considered for such a place, please contact us at accommodation@napier.ac.uk or phone 0131 455 3713

findings.text: The University provides a Private Accommodation Support Service reachable via privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk, offering advice, flat viewings, and landlord references.
ENSA Advice offers free, confidential welfare and accommodation advice, including tenancy checks and dispute help, via phone or email.
University accommodation waiting list inquiries can be made via accommodation@napier.ac.uk or phone 0131 455 3713.
No internal records of Anfal's contact with the accommodation support service are present in the provided source material.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map: Accommodation Support Contact Channels

### Source: NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025)

**Private Accommodation Support Service**
- Email: privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk
- Services: advice, flat viewings, landlord references within 5 working days, signposting.

**ENSA Advice**
- Phone: 0131 229 8791
- Email: ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk
- Services: accommodation advice, lease review, tenant rights, dispute help.

**University Accommodation Waiting List**
- Email: accommodation@napier.ac.uk
- Phone: 0131 455 3713

**Note:** No evidence of Anfal's specific contact with any of these services is found in this source.
proposed_artifacts.title: Accommodation Support Contact Channels Evidence Map

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search for internal records (emails, case notes, CRM logs) referencing Anfal's contact with the accommodation support service, ENSA Advice, or university accommodation office. Look for any correspondence to/from privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk, ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk, or accommodation@napier.ac.uk involving Anfal.
proposed_tasks.title: Search internal records for Anfal's contact with accommodation support

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025) for contact channels of the accommodation support service. Identified three contact routes: Private Accommodation Support Service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk), ENSA Advice (ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk / 0131 229 8791), and University Accommodation waiting list (accommodation@napier.ac.uk / 0131 455 3713). No internal records of Anfal's contact were found in this source. Proposed follow-up task to search internal emails and case notes for evidence of Anfal's engagement.

uncertainties.reason: The brochure describes available services but does not contain any records of Anfal's actual contact. Internal records may exist elsewhere.
